svg.title: OniChase V2 Real Shinkansen Map Draft
svg.desc: Current real Shinkansen network draft map with real currently open lines and stations across Japan.
svg.text: Current real Shinkansen network only: real open lines, real open stations, no future extension segments

g.text: This drawing is geography-aware but still schematic. It is meant for V2 route design, not as a final production map render.
Shared track is drawn once per corridor, then colored line overlays show how the real network branches.

svg.text: Draft basis: current open Shinkansen lines only. Future extensions such as the Hokkaido extension beyond Shin-Hakodate-Hokuto are intentionally excluded.
